description: Composition100% cotton shirt with half sleeves, has plaid checks in shades of blue with grey-brown-purple accents, blue stitch detailing, tape detailing on the in-seam of the collar, patch pockets with snap buttons on both chest, buttoned shoulder flaps, embroidered lettering above left pocket, full length buttoned placket and curved hemlineFittingSlimWash care Machine wash at 40 degree C Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry on normal or line dry Warm iron Get ready to take casual dressing to the next level with this plaid shirt from locomotive. The cool cotton fabric keeps you fresh all day while you hang out with your friends. This shirt can be teamed with low slung jeans and canvas shoes for a laidback look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
